text: The transition from the sterile, white corridor into this vividly painted exhibition space feels like stepping between worlds. As a philosopher, I sense the tension between utility—the fire safety gear and signs outside—and creativity, exploration, and intellect within. The text and displays invite me to contemplate how we innovate, connect, and seek meaning. I feel both anticipation and curiosity, ready to reflect on how knowledge is presented, and how environments shape our thoughts and emotions.
